name: office-mcp
description: Control Microsoft Word and Excel with AppleScript automation (based on Anthropic's Word extension)
long_description:
This extension allows Claude to interact with Microsoft Word and Microsoft Excel on macOS, enabling document creation, editing, formatting, spreadsheet management, and more.

It uses macOS AppleScript automation to control Word and Excel and requires your explicit permission through macOS security prompts before accessing Microsoft Office applications. It is not affiliated with or endorsed by Microsoft Corporation.

Based on Anthropic's Word extension with additional features, improvements, and Excel support.

tools.name: word_create_document
tools.description: Create a new Microsoft Word document with optional content

tools.name: word_open_document
tools.description: Open an existing Microsoft Word document

tools.name: word_get_document_text
tools.description: Get all text content from the active Word document

tools.name: word_get_document_info
tools.description: Get Word document statistics (words, characters, paragraphs, pages)

tools.name: word_insert_text
tools.description: Insert text at the current cursor position in Microsoft Word

tools.name: word_replace_text
tools.description: Find and replace text in the active Word document (max 255 chars per field - for longer text use paragraph tools)

tools.name: word_format_text
tools.description: Apply formatting to the currently selected text in Word

tools.name: word_save_document
tools.description: Save the active Word document

tools.name: word_close_document
tools.description: Close the active Word document

tools.name: word_export_pdf
tools.description: Export the active Word document as PDF

tools.name: word_list_tables
tools.description: List all tables in the active Word document with their dimensions

tools.name: word_get_table_cell
tools.description: Get the text content of a specific table cell in Word

tools.name: word_set_table_cell
tools.description: Set the text content of a specific table cell in Word

tools.name: word_select_table_cell
tools.description: Select a specific table cell and move cursor there in Word

tools.name: word_find_table_header
tools.description: Find a table column by header text in Word

tools.name: word_create_table
tools.description: Create a new table at the current cursor position in Word

tools.name: word_add_table_row
tools.description: Add a new row to a table in Word

tools.name: word_delete_table_row
tools.description: Delete a row from a table in Word

tools.name: word_add_table_column
tools.description: Add a new column to a table in Word

tools.name: word_delete_table_column
tools.description: Delete a column from a table in Word

tools.name: word_list_bookmarks
tools.description: List all bookmarks in the active Word document

tools.name: word_create_bookmark
tools.description: Create a bookmark at the current selection in Word

tools.name: word_goto_bookmark
tools.description: Jump to a bookmark by name in Word

tools.name: word_delete_bookmark
tools.description: Delete a bookmark by name in Word

tools.name: word_list_hyperlinks
tools.description: List all hyperlinks in the active Word document

tools.name: word_create_hyperlink
tools.description: Create a hyperlink at the current selection or cursor position in Word

tools.name: word_list_paragraphs
tools.description: List paragraphs with their styles in the active Word document

tools.name: word_goto_paragraph
tools.description: Jump to a specific paragraph by index in Word

tools.name: word_set_paragraph_style
tools.description: Apply a paragraph style to a specific paragraph in Word

tools.name: word_goto_start
tools.description: Move cursor to the beginning of the Word document

tools.name: word_goto_end
tools.description: Move cursor to the end of the Word document

tools.name: word_get_selection_info
tools.description: Get position and length of current selection in Word

tools.name: word_select_all
tools.description: Select all content in the Word document

tools.name: word_move_cursor_after_text
tools.description: Find text and move cursor after the specified occurrence in Word (max 255 chars)

tools.name: word_insert_image
tools.description: Insert an image into the Word document at the current cursor position

tools.name: word_create_image_ref
tools.description: Create a reusable image ref from a local file for later insertion into Word

tools.name: word_list_inline_shapes
tools.description: List all inline shapes (images, objects) in the active Word document

tools.name: word_resize_inline_shape

tools.name: word_delete_text
tools.description: Delete text or current selection in the active Word document (max 255 chars for find - for longer text use word_delete_paragraph)

tools.name: word_delete_paragraph

tools.name: word_copy_content
tools.description: Copy Word content with formatting to the system clipboard

tools.name: word_capture_content_ref
tools.description: Legacy tool disabled by in-place editing policy. Use word_copy_content or word_copy_story_content instead

tools.name: word_insert_content_ref
tools.description: Insert a local image ref at the current selection; native Word fragment refs are disabled by in-place editing policy

tools.name: word_paste_content

tools.name: word_copy_story_content

tools.name: word_set_story_text

tools.name: word_get_header_text
tools.description: Get the text content of a header in the active Word document

tools.name: word_set_header_text
tools.description: Set the text content of a header in the active Word document

tools.name: word_get_footer_text

tools.name: word_set_footer_text
tools.description: Set the text content of a footer in the active Word document

tools.name: word_insert_header_image
tools.description: Insert an image into a header in the active Word document

tools.name: word_insert_footer_image

tools.name: word_list_sections
tools.description: List all sections with page setup info in the active Word document

tools.name: word_get_section_info

tools.name: word_set_page_setup
tools.description: Set page margins, orientation, and layout for a section in Word

tools.name: word_insert_section_break
tools.description: Insert a section break at the current cursor position in Word

tools.name: word_get_text_formatting
tools.description: Get font, size, bold, italic, and color of the current selection in Word

tools.name: word_get_paragraph_formatting
tools.description: Get style, alignment, indents, and spacing of the current paragraph in Word

tools.name: excel_create_workbook

tools.description: Save the active workbook in Microsoft Excel

tools.name: excel_list_workbooks

tools.name: excel_list_sheets

tools.name: excel_delete_sheet

tools.name: excel_get_range

tools.name: excel_insert_rows
tools.description: Insert rows at a specific position in the active Excel worksheet

tools.name: excel_delete_rows
tools.description: Delete rows at a specific position in the active Excel worksheet

tools.name: excel_insert_columns

tools.name: excel_delete_columns
tools.description: Delete columns at a specific position in the active Excel worksheet

tools.name: excel_set_column_width

tools.name: excel_set_row_height
tools.description: Set the height of a row in the active Excel worksheet

tools.name: excel_sort_range

tools.name: excel_calculate
tools.description: Recalculate all formulas in all open Excel workbooks

tools.name: excel_paste_range
tools.description: Paste the system clipboard into the active Excel workbook at the target cell

tools.name: excel_capture_range_ref
tools.description: Legacy tool disabled by in-place editing policy. Use excel_copy_range instead

tools.name: excel_insert_range_ref
tools.description: Legacy tool disabled by in-place editing policy. Use excel_paste_range instead

tools.name: excel_clear_worksheet

tools.name: excel_set_range_values
tools.description: Set a rectangular Excel range from TSV text in the active workbook
